purpose: Customer-facing local demo page for reviewing login devices, sessions, and security events before future production identity integration.
business_rules: Current session cannot be revoked from the security log action.
Revoked sessions remain visible as audit-style history.
Reporting suspicious activity marks the event and device as high risk in local state.
No real IP address, token, password, or device fingerprint is stored by this local demo.

blockers_before_production: Production identity provider and session service are not connected.
Server-side audit log and risk policy are not implemented.
Compliance review required before production account-protection copy is finalized.
